deals.Description: A vertically-integrated Japanese AI company building out the AI stack from data centers upwards, including infrastructure, orchestration software, AI models, agents, and applications.
deals.Investors: Undisclosed VCs and private investors (for seed), Undisclosed partners (for infrastructure capital)

deals.Description: A Tokyo-based startup building an AI-driven platform aimed at addressing Japan's growing business succession challenges in specialized software companies.
deals.Investors: Undisclosed venture capital firms and private investors

deals.Startup_Name: 株式会社ニューラルポート (Neural Port Inc.)
deals.Description: Develops a VR brain fatigue measurement system 'ZEN EYE Pro' and ZONE training pot 'ZONE-Z' for high-performers. Utilizes eye-tracking and AI technology to visualize stress and support mental performance.
deals.Investors: 三菱UFJモルガン・スタンレー証券株式会社, Angel Investors, 株式会社日本政策金融公庫

deals.Description: Japanese state-backed venture focused on producing cutting-edge 2-nanometer AI chips by 2027, aiming to restore Japan's semiconductor manufacturing capability.
deals.Investors: Japanese government, Fujitsu, Toyota, Sony, NTT, SoftBank
deals.Founders: N/A (founded by a consortium of companies)

deals.Description: Japan-born AI companion startup creating real-time, interactive AI characters, blending generative AI, live streaming, and storytelling.
Developer of specialized 'Agentic AI' for incident management.
deals.Investors: Mitsubishi UFJ Capital, Mizuho Capital, SMBC Venture Capital, Japan Finance Corporation

deals.Description: RECERQA is an agentic ERP platform optimizing enterprise order processing workflows. It leverages AI-driven decision-making agents and data normalization for efficient business operations.
deals.Investors: Angel Bridge Co., Ltd., Genesia Ventures Inc., New Commerce Ventures Inc., individual investors, Mizuho Bank, Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, Shoko Chukin Bank, Resona Bank, Joyo Bank, Hokkoku Bank
deals.Founders: Shotaro Umeda, Momoka Koda, Taku Hiramatsu

deals.Description: State-backed chipmaking venture focused on 2nm chip development, crucial for advanced AI hardware and infrastructure.
deals.Investors: Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI)

deals.Description: Develops Confidential Computing technology for secure data and AI utilization, offering products like Acompany Secure Chat and Secure Code (SaaS).
Operates an HR Tech business utilizing AI SaaS and provides paid employment placement services.
